title: quinquina micrantha
intro: Quinquina micrantha, also known as Cinchona micrantha, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a cinchona tree native to the Andean region of South America, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of malaria, due to the presence of quinine. The health benefits of Quinquina micrantha include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of malaria, and acting as an antimalarial agent. The herbal preparations of Quinquina micrantha include the bark, which can be used to make tea, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
